description: Print the staged Codex migration plan: deploy mode, staged artifact paths, manual-review items, and collisions (--plan, read-only).
rules: stages artifacts and prints the plan; never writes target files
reports planned AGENTS.md / config.toml / skills / subagents and any collisions or orphans
usage: Set SOURCE (Claude source root) and TARGET (Codex root). Output: plan.txt.
limitation: Dry plan only: no Codex files are written. The vendored CLI imports tomllib and needs Python 3.11+ to run; on older Python it degrades to an empty plan.
